title: Printers & stations
description: Set which printer each ticket goes to. That way {{kitchen}} and bar only get what's theirs, with no mix-ups.

errors.title: Couldn't save
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

stations.intro: A station is a prep point (for example {{kitchen}} or bar). Each station prints to one printer.
stations.empty: No stations yet. Create the first one to start routing tickets.

fields.name: Station name
fields.isDefaultHint: The default station receives products that have no route assigned.

stations.deleteMessage: "{{name}}" will be deleted. Products routed to it will be left unrouted.

validation.nameRequired: Enter a name for the station.

printers.intro: Register each physical printer in the venue. In this version printers connect over the network (WiFi/Ethernet).

fields.name: Printer name
fields.addressHint: The printer's IP and its port. The usual port is 9100.

printers.deleteMessage: "{{name}}" will be deleted. Stations using it will be left without a printer.

validation.nameRequired: Enter a name for the printer.

gateway.intro: The gateway is the device (a tablet) that stays on and controls the printers on the venue's network.
gateway.none: No gateway designated. Designate a tablet to control the printers.

routing.intro: Decide which station each {{menu}} category goes to. You can fine-tune by product when one goes to a different station.
routing.empty: No categories in your {{menu}} yet. Create the {{menu}} first.
routing.noDefaultWarning: Unrouted products will print a ticket marked NO STATION. Mark a station as "default" to avoid this.

simulator.title: Simulate a ticket
simulator.description: Pick products and quantities to see which station they'd go to.
simulator.noItems: Add at least one product to simulate.
simulator.unroutedNote: Some products have no station and would come out on a ticket marked NO STATION.
